title: Single mask level forming both top-side-contact and isolation trenches
abstract: A method of forming an integrated circuit (200) includes forming >1 hard mask layer on a device layer (105c) on a BOX layer (105b) of a SOI substrate. A patterned masking layer is used for a trench etch to simultaneously form larger and smaller area trenches through the hard mask layer, device layer and the BOX layer. A dielectric liner (113) is formed for lining the larger and smaller area trenches. A dielectric layer (114) is deposited for completely filling the smaller area trenches and only partially filling the larger area trenches. The larger area trenches are bottom etched through the dielectric layer to provide a top side contact to a handle portion (105a). The handle portion at a bottom of the larger area trenches is implanted to form a handle contact (116), and the larger area trenches are completely filled with an electrically conductive layer (118) to form a top side ohmic contact to the handle contact.
claims:
Claims CLAIMS  What is claimed is: 1. A method of forming an integrated circuit (IC), comprising: forming at least one hard mask layer on a device layer of a silicon-on-Insulator (SOI) substrate including the device layer on a top, a buried oxide (BOX) layer in a middle, and a handle portion on a bottom; etching using a patterned masking layer to simultaneously form both larger area trenches and smaller area trenches through apertures in the masking layer, etching through the device layer and the BOX layer; forming a dielectric liner for lining the larger area trenches and lining the smaller area trenches; depositing a dielectric layer for completely filling the smaller area trenches and only partially filling the larger area trenches; bottom etching the larger area trenches through the dielectric layer to provide a top side contact to the handle portion; implanting the handle portion at a bottom of the larger area trenches to form a handle contact, and completely filling the larger area trenches with an electrically conductive layer to form a top side ohmic contact to the handle contact. 2. The method of claim 1, wherein a width of the larger area trenches is greater than or equal to (>) 1.5 times a width of the smaller area trenches. 3. The method of claim 1, wherein the dielectric layer comprises silicon oxide and the bottom etching comprises dry etching. 4. The method of claim 1, wherein the electrically conductive layer comprises doped polysilicon, and the wherein completely filling comprises depositing in-situ doped polysilicon. 5. The method of claim 4, further comprising performing chemical mechanical planarization (CMP) for removing overburden regions of the doped polysilicon stopping on the hard mask layer lateral to the larger area trenches and the smaller area trenches. 6. The method of claim 1, wherein the handle portion is p-doped, wherein the implanting the handle portion comprises p-type implanting, and wherein the electrically conductive layer comprises p-doped polysilicon. 7. The method of claim 1, wherein the depositing the dielectric layer comprises sub-atmospheric pressure chemical vapor (SACVD) depositing to form a SACVD dielectric, further comprising densifying before SACVD dielectric before the bottom etching. 8. The method of claim 1, wherein the smaller area trenches are configured as inner rings, and wherein the larger area trenches are configured as outer rings. 9. The method of claim 1, wherein a trench depth for the larger area trenches and for the smaller area trenches ranges from 2 Î¼ÏÎ¹Î² to 15 Î¼ÏÎ¹Î². 10. The method of claim 1, wherein the IC includes at least one drain extended metal-oxide- semiconductor (DEMOS) transistor. 11. An integrated circuit (IC), comprising: a silicon-on-insulator (SOI) substrate including a device layer on a top, a buried oxide (BOX) layer in a middle, and a handle portion on a bottom; isolation trenches having a thermal dielectric liner completely filled with a dielectric layer on the thermal dielectric liner extending through the BOX layer to the handle portion, and top side contact (TSC) trenches having sidewalls only partially filled with the dielectric layer on the thermal dielectric liner but not on a bottom of the TSC trenches, including electrically conductive material filling the TSC trenches extending to ohmically contact a handle portion contact of the handle portion, wherein the isolation trenches and the TSC trenches both have a depth of greater than or equal to (>) 2 Î¼ÏÎ¹, and wherein a width of the TSC trenches is greater than or equal to (>) 1.5 times a width of the isolation trenches; and at least a first transistor and a second transistor dielectrically isolated from one by the isolation trenches. 12. The IC of claim 11, wherein the electrically conductive material comprises doped polysilicon. 13. The IC of claim 12, wherein the handle portion is p-doped, and wherein the doped polysilicon comprises p-doped polysilicon. 14. The IC of claim 13, wherein the TSC trenches have a 25 Â°C sheet resistance of less than or equal (<) 70 ohms/sq. 15. The IC of claim 11, wherein the first transistor or the second transistor comprises a drain extended metal-oxide-semiconductor (DEMOS) transistor. 16. The IC of claim 11, wherein the dielectric layer comprises a deposited sub-atmospheric 

 pressure chemical vapor (SACVD) dielectric layer on the thermal dielectric liner. 17. The IC of claim 11, wherein the isolation trenches are configured as inner rings, and the TSC trenches are configured as outer rings. 18. The IC of claim 11, wherein a first isolation trench and at least a second isolation trench provide a shielding island in the device layer in between. 19. The IC of claim 11, wherein the width of the TSC trenches is greater than or equal to (>) 2 times the width of the isolation trenches. 20. A method of forming an integrated circuit (IC), the method comprising: forming at least one hard mask layer on a device layer of a silicon-on-Insulator (SOI) substrate including the device layer on a top, a buried oxide (BOX) layer in a middle, and a handle portion on a bottom; etching using a patterned masking layer to simultaneously form both larger area top-side- contact (TSC) trenches and smaller area isolation trenches through apertures in the masking layer, etching through the device layer and the BOX layer; forming a dielectric liner for lining the TSC trenches and lining the isolation trenches; depositing a dielectric layer for completely filling the isolation trenches and only partially filling the TSC trenches; bottom etching the TSC trenches through the dielectric layer to provide a top side contact to the handle portion; implanting the handle portion at a bottom of the TSC trenches to form a handle contact, and completely filling the TSC trenches with an electrically conductive layer to form a top side ohmic contact to the handle contact.
